---
title: 'iphone-bug-display'
---

# Steps to reproduce

As a host, create a session
Share the code with a participant using an iphone

As a participant join the session using the given code.

## Actual

As a participant I see a display bug on the 4 answer boxes: a text displays in overlay "Selection recorded  - you can change it until the host reveals."

See the screenshot iphone-bug-display.jpg

## Expected

As a participant I see the 4 answer boxes without any bugs.
